section_name: Exclusive Regulation of the Operation of Automated Motor Vehicles and Automated Driving Systems
text:
(a) Unless otherwise provided by this subchapter, the operation of automated motor vehicles, including any commercial use, and automated driving systems are governed exclusively by:

(1) this subchapter; and

(2) Section 547.618 (Equipment Required for Certain Automated Motor Vehicles) .

(b) A political subdivision of this state or a state agency may not impose a franchise or other regulation related to the operation of an automated motor vehicle or automated driving system.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.452 — Exclusive Regulation of the Operation of Automated Motor Vehicles and Automated Driving Systems

(a) Unless otherwise provided by this subchapter, the operation of automated motor vehicles, including any commercial use, and automated driving systems are governed exclusively by:

    (1) this subchapter; and

    (2) Section 547.618 (Equipment Required for Certain Automated Motor Vehicles) .

(b) A political subdivision of this state or a state agency may not impose a franchise or other regulation related to the operation of an automated motor vehicle or automated driving system.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 892 (H.B.3026), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Unless otherwise provided by this subchapter, the operation of automated motor vehicles, including any commercial use, and automated driving systems are governed exclusively by:
Section 547.618 (Equipment Required for Certain Automated Motor Vehicles) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A political subdivision of this state or a state agency may not impose a franchise or other regulation related to the operation of an automated motor vehicle or automated driving system.
